name: Deadly Harvest
short_description: Annihilate hordes of wraiths, pumpkins, rats & snakes while defending your farm in Deadly Harvest. Get massive combos in this spooky, casual roguelite, uncovering dark secrets to take on the Headless Horseman!
detailed_description:
Defeat the Pumpkin Invasion!


Deadly Harvest is a casual roguelite survival game with a spooky atmosphere. When your New England farm is overrun by mobs of creepy creatures, it's up to you to drive them back, defend your village, and survive the fight against the legendary Headless Horseman himself. Gain levels to upgrade your weapons, collect gold to power-up your character between attempts, and see if you can uncover the secret to banishing the Horseman back to the underworld for good.



Photosensitivity Warning

This game may contain flashing lights, images, and other luminous stimulations which may induce epileptic seizures in certain individuals. If you or anyone in your household has an epileptic condition, please consult your doctor before playing any game. If you experience dizziness, altered vision, eye or muscle twitches, loss of awareness, disorientation, any involuntary movement, or convulsions while playing, please immediately discontinue playing the game and consult your doctor.
